name: 羽翼的祈愿 - Feather Of Praying
short_description: This is a horror puzzle RPG first released in 2016. Players control Qiu Xiaoqi as she explores a mysterious room filled with puzzles alongside a white-haired youth. They unravel mechanisms to uncover the truth behind her loss of consciousness. Will the wish be fulfilled? The story is yours to shape!
detailed_description:
Game Information

"Feather Of Praying" is a horror puzzle RPG released in 2016, which has received numerous positive reviews since its launch.

The game was officially launched on Steam in 2018 and underwent a major update in 2024,

adding new endings while also bringing new puzzle content and performance experiences.


About the Game

“I'll tell you another story.”

“This is a story about a girl and a wish.”

“A warm and romantic fairy tale…”

This is a story about "wishes".

Interwoven with feelings of sadness and healing, where terrifying scenes blend with dreams.

“Let me fulfill your wish for you, but the corresponding price is…”

In this game, players will take on the role of a girl named Qiu Xiaoqi, waking up in a strange room. She will explore the mysterious room filled with puzzles alongside a mysterious young man with white hair, unraveling layers of mechanisms and uncovering the truth behind her loss of consciousness.

In this journey full of choices and unknowns,

players will face various challenges as they explore in a terrifying environment,

experiencing the profound emotional journeys of the characters through memories and dreams, exploring the wishes hidden deep within their hearts.

Will this wish be fulfilled? How will this story unfold? Everything is for you to write…

  • Immersive horror atmosphere

    Every unknown fear draws you deeply into it.

  • Intricate puzzle design

    Creative mechanisms provide a unique exploration experience.

  • Heart-pounding storyline

    The profound emotional journeys of the characters present a moving tale.

  • Rich sound performance

    Beautiful music and intense sound effects perfectly blend into the game atmosphere.

Game Type: Horror Puzzle
Number of Endings: 7 (*updated in 2024)
Estimated Playtime: 2-4 hours

Basic Controls:
Movement: Arrow keys
Investigate/Confirm: Z/Space/Enter
Menu/Cancel: X/ESC
Save Management: F5
Resolution Adjustment: F6
Run: Shift

  • Game Author: 秋之忧郁

  • Game Artist: 雨兮

  • Game Publisher: Eternal Dream Studio

  • For more staff, please see the in-game credits.

This is the first horror puzzle game I developed in 2016.

It was my first time making a horror puzzle game, so I hope everyone understands if there are any shortcomings.

The game does not contain any jump-scare CG flashes, so there’s no need to worry about being startled by CG suddenly~

This game has undergone multiple tests, but if there are any remaining bugs, please report them immediately.

Feedback channel: 413228337@qq.com
